sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79078" key="para/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παράφων-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n79078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounding beside</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παράφωνοι, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accompaniment, obbligato</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28.1</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n79078.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounds midway between consonances and dissonances</tr_>, e.g. the tritone, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2137.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gaud.Harm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
